cards.back:
```
ip route 10.1.1.0 255.255.255.0 192.168.2.1 200
```
AD 200 > default 1, so only used when primary route gone.

```
router ospf 1
 router-id 1.1.1.1
 network 10.0.0.0 0.0.0.255 area 0
 network 192.168.1.0 0.0.0.255 area 0
 passive-interface default
 no passive-interface gi0/0
```

cards.front: OSPF on a specific interface (no `network` statement)?
cards.back:
```
router ospf 1
 router-id 1.1.1.1
!
interface gi0/0
 ip ospf 1 area 0
```

cards.front: Set OSPF cost on an interface?
cards.back:
```
interface gi0/0
 ip ospf cost 50
```

```
interface gi0/0
 ip ospf priority 100
```
Higher priority wins. Priority 0 = ineligible.

cards.front: Standard numbered ACL — permit one network, deny rest?
cards.back:
```
access-list 10 permit 10.1.1.0 0.0.0.255
access-list 10 deny any log
!
interface gi0/0
 ip access-group 10 in
```

cards.front: Extended numbered ACL — permit HTTP from network to server?
cards.back:
```
access-list 100 permit tcp 10.1.1.0 0.0.0.255 host 10.2.2.5 eq 80
access-list 100 deny ip 10.1.1.0 0.0.0.255 host 10.2.2.5
access-list 100 permit ip any any
!
interface gi0/0
 ip access-group 100 in
```

```
ip access-list extended BLOCK_TELNET
 deny tcp 10.1.1.0 0.0.0.255 any eq 23
 permit ip any any
!
interface gi0/0
 ip access-group BLOCK_TELNET in
```

cards.front: VTY ACL — permit only one host to SSH/Telnet to router?
cards.back:
```
access-list 5 permit host 10.1.1.5
!
line vty 0 4
 access-class 5 in
 transport input ssh
```

cards.front: Create VLAN + name + assign access port?
cards.back:
```
vlan 10
 name SALES
!
interface fa0/1
 switchport mode access
 switchport access vlan 10
```

cards.front: Trunk config — 802.1Q, native VLAN, allowed list?
cards.back:
```
interface gi0/24
 switchport trunk encapsulation dot1q
 switchport mode trunk
 switchport trunk native vlan 99
 switchport trunk allowed vlan 10,20,30,99
```
On 2960/3560+, `encapsulation dot1q` not needed (only one option).

```
interface gi0/0
 no shutdown
!
interface gi0/0.10
 encapsulation dot1q 10
 ip address 10.10.10.1 255.255.255.0
!
interface gi0/0.20
 encapsulation dot1q 20
 ip address 10.10.20.1 255.255.255.0
```

cards.front: L3 switch — SVI for VLAN routing?
cards.back:
```
ip routing
!
interface vlan 10
 ip address 10.10.10.1 255.255.255.0
 no shutdown
```

```
ip dhcp excluded-address 10.1.1.1 10.1.1.10
!
ip dhcp pool LAN
 network 10.1.1.0 255.255.255.0
 default-router 10.1.1.1
 dns-server 8.8.8.8
 lease 7
```

cards.front: DHCP relay (router forwards DHCP to server in another subnet)?
cards.back:
```
interface gi0/0
 ip helper-address 10.2.2.5
```

```
interface gi0/0
 ip nat inside
!
interface gi0/1
 ip nat outside
!
ip nat inside source static 10.1.1.5 203.0.113.5
```

```
access-list 1 permit 10.1.1.0 0.0.0.255
!
interface gi0/0
 ip nat inside
!
interface gi0/1
 ip nat outside
!
ip nat inside source list 1 interface gi0/1 overload
```

cards.front: HSRP basic config (two routers, R1 active)?
cards.back:
```
! On R1
interface gi0/0
 ip address 10.1.1.2 255.255.255.0
 standby 1 ip 10.1.1.1
 standby 1 priority 110
 standby 1 preempt

```
interface range gi0/1 - 2
 channel-group 1 mode active
!
interface port-channel 1
 switchport mode trunk
 switchport trunk allowed vlan 10,20
```

cards.front: Port-security — sticky MAC, max 2, shutdown on violation?
cards.back:
```
interface fa0/1
 switchport mode access
 switchport port-security
 switchport port-security maximum 2
 switchport port-security mac-address sticky
 switchport port-security violation shutdown
```

```
hostname R1
ip domain-name example.com
crypto key generate rsa modulus 2048
!
username admin privilege 15 secret cisco
!
line vty 0 4
 transport input ssh
 login local
```

```
interface loopback 0
 ip address 1.1.1.1 255.255.255.255
!
router ospf 1
 router-id 1.1.1.1
```

```
banner motd ^
WARNING: Authorized access only.
^
```

```
copy running-config startup-config
! or shortcut:
write memory
! or:
wr
```

```
reload
```

cards.front: Disable DNS lookup on misspelled commands (saves time)?
cards.back:
```
no ip domain-lookup
```

```
enable secret cisco123
```

```
line console 0
 logging synchronous
 exec-timeout 0 0
 password cisco
 login
```

cards.front: Spanning-tree make a switch root for VLAN 10?
cards.back:
```
spanning-tree vlan 10 root primary
! or set explicit priority:
spanning-tree vlan 10 priority 4096
```

```
router ospf 1
 redistribute static subnets
```

cards.front: Verify reachability + path in one command sequence?
